programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy head to Glendale, Ariz., where vicious entities have turned a couple's dream home into a nightmare; with the unexplained activity getting worse by the day, they are terrified their family will fall apart if they don't get help soon.

programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: House Calls
programme.desc: Zak sends the team to investigate a family of first responders tormented by poltergeist activity; as Jay becomes violently ill, the guys fear human ashes in the home and a loved one's brush with devil worshipping opened a gateway for dark entities.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: House Calls
programme.desc: Zak dispatches the team to Washington where a family is concerned about a possible demonic energy in their home; a shocking experience leads the guys to suspect dark forces influenced the daughter to allow evil to enter her life.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: House Calls
programme.desc: Zak's team responds to a historic house in Georgia that doubles as a haunted attraction; the owner fears something nefarious is attacking his mother, the home's only overnight resident.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: House Calls
programme.desc: Zak dispatches the team to Indiana where a family believes their home is under siege from a demonic entity; with the mother's health in jeopardy from the disturbing activity, the guys race to find answers.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: House Calls
programme.desc: Zak and the team answer an urgent call from a Texas couple who feel manipulated by a controlling entity; facing escalating poltergeist activity, the guys discover a voodoo curse could be fueling the dark energy that has invaded the home.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: The crew travels to a sinister ghost town near Wolf Creek, Ore.; an aggressive entity overtakes Zak; a dark force incapacitates Aaron; eerie figures; a voice warns of a demonic presence.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: The crew travels to Oregon to investigate the mysterious Wolf Creek Inn, a historic building riddled with aggressive negative energy, apparitions and a vampire-like creature; Aaron experiences a dramatic psychological breakdown.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak and the crew head to Idaho to investigate the Albion State Normal School, where dark energy from satanic graffiti is affecting its staff; Jay and others are aggressively marked with strange symbols behind their ears.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak and the crew head to a museum in Montrose, Colo., where something threatens the health of its employees; exploring the property's violent history and disturbing evidence of a dangerous entity.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to Springfield, Mo., to investigate Pythian Castle, a historic building infected with violent spirits who appear to mimic the living and deliver fatal premonitions.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate the massive Titanic Museum in Branson, Mo.; employees believe the spirits of the 1,496 people who lost their lives on April 14, 1912, have found their way to the museum dedicated to their memory.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Cecil Hotel
programme.desc: Part 1/2. Zak and the crew investigate a dark mystery surrounding the death of Elisa Lam at the notorious Cecil Hotel; they retrace her steps the night she disappeared in 2013 and uncover a possible demonic connection through serial killer Richard Ramirez.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Cecil Hotel
programme.desc: Part 2/2. The crew unlocks the dark mysteries of the Cecil Hotel as they continue their investigation of the Los Angeles landmark; Zak Bagans calls on psychic medium Patti Negri to help them connect to the lost souls from decades of unthinkable tragedies.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak and the crew hop aboard a 100-year-old steam engine for a lockdown; it's a paranormal-packed ride as the guys investigate reports of apparitions and strange anomalies along the Nevada Northern Railway.

programme.desc: The crew investigates a former brothel and saloon in Albuquerque, N.M., that is reportedly inhabited by an aggressive male spirit.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: In the summer of 1952, stories of U.S. Air Force jets chasing UFOs over the White House knock the Korean War off the front pages of newspapers; as rumors spread, President Harry S. Truman demands to know what was flying over his house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: A young recruit encounters aliens in the Nevada desert in the 1960s; he claims they were working with the US military and housed a spaceship in a secret hangar nearby.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.sub-title: Billy Meir, The Plejaren and the Multiverse
programme.desc: Billy Meier claims he's traveled through time and space with an alien race from the Pleiades star cluster; in the decades following his revelation, both skeptics and ufologists say it's a hoax despite Meier providing photographic evidence.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.sub-title: Paul Bennewitz and Project Seven Lambs
programme.desc: In 1978, UFO enthusiast Paul Bennewitz claims he's intercepted extraterrestrial messages; military officials send counterintelligence officer Richard Doty to feed Bennewitz lies, questioning whether Doty himself is a pawn in an even bigger scheme.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.sub-title: Rendlesham Forest, Back from the Future
programme.desc: In 1980, a UFO detected on military radar, lands near crucial NATO bases; a group of military personnel claim to have seen a shiny metallic object with colored lights and hieroglyphic inscriptions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: Triangle shaped hovering objects are seen by thousands of people and investigated by scientists and government officials, yet they could never be explained; the sightings occurred in a more than two year wave over Belgium, beginning in late 1989.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: On a September morning in 1994, students at a Zimbabwe school witness a silver craft land in a nearby field; numerous adults corroborate the UFO sighting, but the children are silenced; many maintain their account of the incident is true.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: Lt. Ryan Graves and pilots in his squadron detect and engage with UFOs on multiple occasions; he gave a detailed description of regular encounters that flight teams had with a black box UFO they were seeing every day.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: Demonic Doll Attack in West Virginia and More
programme.desc: Two brothers attempt to communicate with a doll with a demonic disposition; a backwoods biker encounters evidence of skinwalker activity; UFOs crash an Independence Day celebration.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: Bigfoot Spotted in the Rocky Mountains and More
programme.desc: Train passengers spot Bigfoot in broad daylight; a family gets more than a theme park thrill when a ghost hitches a ride on a roller coaster; a groundskeeper contends with a pesky poltergeist in a cemetery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: Glitch in Reality, Long Island Bigfoot and More
programme.desc: Glitches in the matrix stun spectators in Paris, Los Angeles and Argentina; a spirit attempts to halt construction on a family's home in the Philippines; a Bigfoot enthusiast captures something shocking in Long Island.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A mother's blood runs cold when a ghostly child photobombs a family picture in England; a shape-shifting alien sends a family running for cover in Mexico; a social media influencer finds a monster under her bed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: Beware the Doll at the Haunted Inn and More
programme.desc: A doll comes to life at a notoriously haunted hotel; a UFO is spotted flying close to a volcano; a man gains a ghostly bedmate; locals are stumped by strange lights in the Ozarks.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: A Shadow Creature in Maine and More

programme.desc: A woman captures a terrifying entity on a security cam. A tiny orb looks eerily similar to a dearly departed pet. A cruise ship passenger sees something spectacular in the skies above the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.sub-title: Man's Best Ghost Friend and More

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: A Ghost Hunt in a Haunted Prison & More
